metadata.title: Projects | Andrea Losavio
metadata.description: Custom solutions for clients and personal projects to deliver value and explore new ideas

hero.title: Works <highlight>for clients</highlight> and <highlight>side projects</highlight>

common.noResults: No projects found with selected filters

othersideTechnology.name: Otherside Technology S.r.l.
othersideTechnology.description: Otherside Technology is a company that designs and develops custom software and artificial intelligence solutions for businesses: it helps organizations automate processes, analyze data, and improve decision-making through tailored digital tools and scalable AI systems.

coolifyManager.name: Coolify Manager
coolifyManager.description: Coolify Manager is a Chrome extension that lets you manage your self-hosted Coolify server directly from your browser toolbar.

quido.name: Quido S.r.l.
quido.description: Quido.ai is an artificial intelligence platform dedicated to the world of private equity and M&A transactions in Italy, designed to provide reliable analysis and insights to professionals and investors.

forfettarioControl.name: Forfettario Control
forfettarioControl.description: This mobile app helps freelancers under the regime forfettario manage their business autonomously. Users can create invoices, upload fiscal documents, and receive reminders for deadlines, including pension contributions. The design focuses on simplicity and clarity, making complex administrative tasks easy to handle directly from their smartphone.

fastmemo.name: Fast Memo - Notes in one click
fastmemo.description: An application for taking notes that aims to condense everything you need for organization, security, and reliability, with full data transparency and self-managed storage, without relying on third-party services.

anonymous.name: Anonymous
anonymous.description: A platform to manage tobacconists and agents, featuring an interactive map of over 7000 tobacconists in Lombardy.

ravenn.name: Ravenn S.r.l.
ravenn.description: Ravenn.io is an intuitive platform for managing logistics and hospitality in events: it identifies suitable accommodation for participants and streamlines hotel bookings, cancellations, and modifications in a simplified and efficient way.

recrowd.name: Recrowd S.r.l.
recrowd.description: Recrowd is a real estate crowdfunding platform that allows you to invest your savings in an alternative way, even if you don't have large amounts of capital.

andreaLosavio.name: Andrea Losavio
andreaLosavio.description: The previous version of my personal website, showcasing my projects and skills as a developer.

brainplatform.name: Brainplatform S.r.l.
brainplatform.description: Brain S.R.L. transforms your website or app into a powerful marketing asset, combining eye-catching design with high performance and communicating your brand's values with authority to keep you ahead of the competition. With many years of experience in the industry, the company is skilled in a wide range of technologies suitable for every type of client.

studioBargiggia.name: Studio Bargiggia
studioBargiggia.description: Studio Bargiggia is a condominium management firm that combines expertise, availability, and passion to ensure the best possible administration of your building.
